headline.es: Patch 7.1e: Taliyah llega al juego. Dive agresivo domina — Wukong y Hecarim son los junglas más fuertes. Garen y Ryze nerfed. Kayn y Graves buffed. ADCs de on-hit (Xayah, Jhin, Ezreal) lideran Dragon Lane.
headline.en: Patch 7.1e: Taliyah joins the game. Aggressive dive dominates — Wukong and Hecarim are the strongest junglers. Garen and Ryze nerfed. Kayn and Graves buffed. On-hit ADCs (Xayah, Jhin, Ezreal) lead Dragon Lane.

note.es: Taliyah añadida. Garen, Ryze, Twisted Fate nerfed. Kayn, Graves, Bard buffed. Kraken Slayer y Randuin's Omen ajustados.
note.en: Taliyah added. Garen, Ryze, Twisted Fate nerfed. Kayn, Graves, Bard buffed. Kraken Slayer and Randuin's Omen adjusted.

note.es: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.
note.en: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.

note.es: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.
note.en: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.

note.es: K'Sante añadido. Nuevo sistema de runas. Boots rework (precio reducido).
note.en: K'Sante added. New rune system. Boots rework (price reduced).
